Categorie

Containers

7 reviewed packages available for Containers.

Docker

docker

Container tooling for building, sharing, and running applications.

  • Alpine
  • Arch
  • Debian
  • Fedora
  • macOS
  • openSUSE
  • Windows

Helm

helm

Package manager for deploying applications to Kubernetes.

  • Alpine
  • Arch
  • Debian
  • Fedora
  • macOS
  • openSUSE
  • Windows

K9s

k9s

Terminal user interface for managing Kubernetes clusters.

  • Alpine
  • Arch
  • macOS
  • Windows

kind

kind

Tool for running local Kubernetes clusters in Docker containers.

  • Alpine
  • Arch
  • macOS
  • Windows

kubectl

kubectl

Official command-line client for Kubernetes clusters.

  • Alpine
  • Arch
  • Debian
  • Fedora
  • macOS
  • openSUSE
  • Windows

minikube

minikube

Local Kubernetes cluster runner for development and testing.

  • Arch
  • Debian
  • Fedora
  • macOS
  • Windows

Podman

podman

Daemonless OCI container and pod management engine.

  • Alpine
  • Arch
  • Debian
  • Fedora
  • macOS
  • openSUSE
  • Windows

Catalog 2026.07.13.1 · bundled development fixture; CLI authentication is authoritative

Source and releases (configured by the deploying repository) · No runtime backend
